docs.title: Introduction to Information Retrieval
docs.text:
In this tutorial we'll be using Python. The goals of this workshop are:

  • Implement Classical and Neural IR approaches!
  • Have fun!

docs.title: About this tutorial
docs.text:
The tutorial session is broken down into the following sections:

  • Boolean Retrieval

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This project demonstrates how to build a simple Boolean Retrieval System that allows users to perform AND, OR, and NOT queries on a collection of documents. We use NLTK for stopword removal and regular expressions for query parsing.

docs.title: Dataset
docs.text: We use the BeIR/FiQA dataset, a financial question-answering dataset, to construct the index and perform queries.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Make sure you have Python installed, then install the required dependencies:

pip install datasets nltk
python -c "import nltk; nltk.download('stopwords')"

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: The notebook Boolean Retrieval on demo of a Boolean Retriever.
